generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance DataTranslationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Component responsible for serializing raw sensor data into aligned message formats with unit conversions for ACC system functions"
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:ActuatingComponent [
    base:desc "Handles operator commands for ACC system control including enable/disable, speed settings, and emergency braking via ROS2 nodes"
]

instance ComputationalOffloadingEngine : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cloud-based resource transferring ACC functions (lead vehicle detection, speed computation) from onboard ECUs to offload processing"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary 3D spatial mapping sensor providing point cloud data for object detection and path projection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance MotorController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle motor control unit reporting real-time motor state and performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorStateData
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering system component transmitting real-time steering angle and position data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringPositionData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Comprehensive onboard sensor aggregating vehicle dynamics (speed, acceleration, yaw rate) for state monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateMetrics
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
    DTDFVocab:transmissionProtocol UDP
    DTDFVocab:dataType PointCloud
]

instance MotorStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorController
    DTDFVocab:transmissionProtocol UDP
    DTDFVocab:dataType MotorPerformanceMetrics
]

instance SteeringPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServo
    DTDFVocab:transmissionProtocol UDP
    DTDFVocab:dataType SteeringAngle
]

instance VehicleStateMetrics : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
    DTDFVocab:transmissionProtocol UDP
    DTDFVocab:dataType VehicleState
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PointCloudClusteringComponent
    DTDFVocab:transmissionProtocol UDP
    DTDFVocab:dataType ObjectDetectionTracks
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PathProjectionComponent
    DTDFVocab:transmissionProtocol UDP
    DTDFVocab:dataType DrivingPathProjection
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D point cloud processing model implementing clustering algorithms for object detection and segmentation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationComponent
]

instance ObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "State estimation model tracking detected objects through vehicle movement"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationComponent
]

instance DrivingPathProjectionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Path planning model projecting current vehicle state into future trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationComponent
]

instance VehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical database storing vehicle state metrics for analysis and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateMetrics
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

instance ObjectDetectionHistory : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Archive of detected objects and their tracks for troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

instance ProjectedPathsArchive : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical storage of projected driving paths for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProjectedDrivingPath
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCFunctionParameters : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Configuration parameters for ACC system functions (lead vehicle distance, speed limits)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RemoteManagementService
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationalOffloadingEngine
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based frontend collecting raw sensor data from physical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationComponent
]

instance PointCloudClusteringComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software component processing point cloud data for object detection and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackData
]

instance DataTranslationComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package serializing and converting sensor data for inter-entity communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables LiDARPointCloudData, MotorStateData, SteeringPositionData, VehicleStateMetrics
]

instance ROS2CommunicationLayer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time UDP communication infrastructure for inter-entity messaging"
    DTDFVocab:enables LiDARPointCloudData, MotorStateData, SteeringPositionData, VehicleStateMetrics,
                        ObjectTrackData, ProjectedDrivingPath
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "User interface for real-time visualization of vehicle state and projected paths"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationInsight, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationalOffloadingEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based processing engine handling ACC system computations offloaded from ECUs"
    DTDFVocab:enables LeadVehicleDetectionService, SpeedComputationService, ActuationCommandService
]

instance RemoteManagementInterface : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control panel component enabling operator commands for ACC system management"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnableDisableACCAction, SpeedSettingAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance ROS2PackageContainer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Container hosting all ROS2 nodes implementing Digital Twin functionality"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectingFE, PointCloudClusteringComponent, DataTranslationComponent,
                        DataMonitoringService, ComputationalOffloadingEngine, RemoteManagementInterface
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service showing vehicle state data, projected paths, and detected object tracks with data saving capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system functions (lead vehicle detection, speed computation) from onboard ECUs to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionService, SpeedComputationService, ActuationCommandService
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operator interface enabling ACC enable/disable, speed settings, and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableDisableACCAction, SpeedSettingAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state metrics, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks for operator monitoring"
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates detailed reports from collected vehicle data for troubleshooting and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Detects lead vehicle in ACC system using point cloud data and object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedComputationService : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computes safe speed based on distance to lead vehicle and vehicle dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActuationCommandService : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates braking/acceleration commands based on computed speed and system state"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableDisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables/disables the ACC system via operator command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedSettingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets desired speed for ACC system operation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issues emergency braking command when safety thresholds are exceeded"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C17: Environment
instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LiDARSensor, MotorController, SteeringServo, VehicleStateSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataTranslationComponent, PointCloudClusteringComponent, ComputationalOffloadingEngine,
                    DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementInterface, ROS2CommunicationLayer
]

instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEnvironment, DigitalTwinEnvironment
    base:desc "1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle with resource-constrained ECUs in ACC/ADAS domain"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., ACC, motor actuation, steering servo) are generated by the Controlling FE, processed by the Data Translation component, and transmitted over Wi-Fi using UDP to physical actuators. Specific command message formats, validation, authentication, feedback mechanisms, conflict resolution, and execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization with 100 ms accuracy required for computation offloading, driven by safety-critical vehicular application standards; hardware limitations necessitate this specific temporal granularity for physical-digital component synchronization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architecture based on ISO 23247 Reference Architecture; SW components organized into Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User Entities, each deployed as ROS2 packages on separate hardware. Physical Twin Entity hosts general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking), differing from standard's OME by encompassing inherent system resources. User Interface FE split into visualization and control panel subcomponents; Data Storage component lacks aligned FE."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 is used for intra-system software component communication, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer. Network topology, bandwidth requirements, latency specifications, reliability mechanisms, redundancy, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard, specifically Part 2 (Reference Architecture) defining entity-based structure with Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Part 4 (Information Exchange) governs data interoperability, with implementations utilizing OPC Unified Architecture for device communication and data exchange."
]
